Inquire
Toronto Wedding Photographer

Your day,
honestly
told.

Documentary wedding photography — candid, cinematic, and deeply human.

Hi, my name
is Brennan.

A Toronto-based wedding photographer with a background in documentary and editorial work. I want your photos to feel like your day actually felt. Natural, unguarded, and completely your own. Forced poses aren’t my thing. I’m after the in-between moments, the ones you didn’t know were happening. Fleeting emotions, the things you’ll actually want to remember.

The best version of your wedding day is one where you’re fully present. You deserve to enjoy the experience my job is to make sure you can. I work intuitively and with intention, so you get to live it and the photographs show exactly that.

Before every wedding I get on a call with my couples. I want to know what matters to you, how involved you want me, and what the day is going to look and feel like. Some couples want me close and leading. Others want space. Most land somewhere in between and I’m comfortable with all of it.

How it
works

Before the day, we talk. I want to understand what matters to you — the vibe, the venue, how you feel about cameras. On the day, I show up prepared and confident, so you don’t have to think about any of it.

01
Inquire

Send me a note through the form below or at hello@brennansuche.com. I’ll get back to you within 48 hours and we’ll find a time to chat!

02
Connect

We get on a call before anything else. I want to hear about your day — the venue, the vibe, how you feel about being in front of a camera. It means I already know what matters most before I walk in the door.

03
Secure your date

If it feels like a good fit on both sides, I’ll send over a contract and a deposit locks in your date. Simple as that.

Packages &
Pricing

Limited bookings per season
01 Elopement
Just the Two of You
Up to 4 hours

Intimate ceremonies, city hall moments, or off-grid vows. Everything you need, nothing you don’t. Delivered as a curated gallery of 250+ images.

From $1,600 CAD
02 Full Day
The Whole Story
10–12 hours

Getting ready through the last dance. Family formals, portraits that feel like the two of you, and every moment in-between. 600+ images.

From $3,000 CAD
03 Wedding Video
Your Wedding in Motion

For couples who want to relive the day in motion. I offer a full wedding day film with documentary edit and highlight reel, or a ceremony-only cut.

Inquire for custom quote

Let’s talk
about your day.

I take on a limited number of weddings each year. If the work resonates with you, reach out — even if your date feels far away. I’d rather have the conversation early.
